message:
feat(observability): add task-console wire snapshot format and CLI viewer

Introduce a deterministic, schema-versioned wire payload
(TaskConsoleWireSnapshot) for task-inspector state so that runtime
diagnostics snapshots can be captured, serialized, and replayed
reproducibly. The wire types (TaskSummaryWire, TaskDetailsWire,
TaskRegionCountWire) derive Serialize/Deserialize, enforce sorted-by-ID
ordering, and expose schema validation via has_expected_schema().

Add a doctor task-console-view CLI subcommand that loads a snapshot JSON
file, validates its schema version, optionally truncates the task list
for display, and emits a structured JSON summary -- enabling offline
inspection of runtime state without a live process.

Include contract tests (ecosystem_console_wire_protocol) verifying
schema round-trip and conversion fidelity, and integration tests
(ecosystem_console_cli_viewer) validating CLI output structure, task
truncation, and schema-mismatch rejection behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
